title: Charmbound
description: Charmbound adds new charm items that will add effects when they are in your inventory.
body:
![The logo of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c6fae39bef6b5ecf3f9d0cd9a1d8b9753495b6d.png)
**Charmbound** is a mod that adds 8 new charm items to your Minecraft world with some special effects when in your inventory!

They include:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
-   Charm of Swiftness
-   Charm of Fortitude
-   Charm of Embers
-   Charm of Insight
-   Charm of the Miner
-   Charm of the Ocean
-   Charm of Vitality
-   Charm of Fortune

</details>
These items can currently only be crafted using their respective recipes.

### Credits
- The Charm sprite used in this mod was originally created by [SirAndriy](https://sirandriy.itch.io/free-icons-16x16) and recoloured with permission with permission stated on the project’s page.
- Guidebook GUI originally created by [thisguy1045](https://www.deviantart.com/thisguy1045/art/Minecraft-Mod-Book-GUI-346997700)
